title: juncus acutiflorus subsp. rugosus
intro: Juncus acutiflorus subsp. rugosus, also known as the rough-flowered rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus acutiflorus plant, belonging to the family Juncaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections and joint pain. The health benefits of Juncus acutiflorus subsp. rugosus include its ability to help reduce swelling, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
